calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Andrew N. Contopoulos, Esq., for the Plaintiff Sojourn Propeeties, INC.
Witness Karen Hargje-Fout sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Shondi A. Lottie.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1272 Market Street, No.209 San Francisco, California 94102.
Damages $1,360.00
Holdover damages $340.05
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $270.00
For a Total Judgment of $1,970.05
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Adrian Colley; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojourn Properties Inc. is present. Represented by.
Attorney Andrew Contopoulos for the plaintiff.
Defendant SHONDI A. LOTTIE DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Shondi A. Lottie. The trial date of JUN-15-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
